question: Will a rock float in the atmosphere of Earth?
context: Things only float if they are less dense than the surrounding material.
The atmosphere of Earth is made up of air.
response:
<reasoning>
Things only float if they are less dense than the surrounding material.
Rocks are denser than air.
The atmosphere of Earth is made up of air.
A rock is denser than the surrounding atmosphere of Earth.
A rock will not float in the atmosphere of Earth.
<answer> No
claims: Things only float if they are less dense than the surrounding material
The atmosphere of Earth is made up of air
A rock is denser than the surrounding atmosphere of Earth
A rock will not float in the atmosphere of Earth
